title: Lucid (LCID) expects EV output to double in 2025 as the Gravity SUV rolls out
text: Lucid delivered 15,841 vehicles in 2025, achieving nearly doubled production year over year and in-line with its 2025 annual production guidance of approximately 18,000 vehicles despite supply chain and tariff headwinds. The company had revised its 2025 guidance multiple times throughout the year. For a second consecutive quarter, the company cut the high end of its annual production guidance to around 18,000 vehicles from a previous forecast of between 18,000 and 20,000 units. Lucid announced its 2026 annual production guidance of 25,000 – 27,000 vehicles and will continue to prudently manage and adjust production to meet sales and delivery needs. This would represent a roughly 40% to 51% increase compared with 2025. The company's main priorities for 2026 are achieving its production target, growing sales, continuing efficiency gains and preparing for production of the midsize vehicle and robotaxis.
